                       PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING APP CONNECTOR METRICS LOG FIELDS




Private Access (ZPA)
Understanding App Connector Metrics
Log Fields
The Log Streaming Service (LSS) can send App Connector Metrics log information to any third-party
log analytics tool. By default, the App Connector Metrics log type includes the fields listed in the
following table for each log template (i.e., CSV, JSON, TSV). While configuring your log receiver, you
can edit the default log stream content to capture only specific fields, and create a custom log template.
    View an example App Connector Metrics log.

         {"LogTimestamp": "Thu Oct 7 10:40:00 2021","Connector":"USconnector-1633598427585","C
         PUUtilization":"1","SystemMemoryUtilization":"9","ProcessMemoryUtilization":"4","AppCo
         unt":"129","ServiceCount":"67","TargetCount":"67","AliveTargetCount":"62","ActiveConne
         ctionsToPublicSE":"1","DisconnectedConnectionsToPublicSE":"0","ActiveConnectionsToPriv
         ateSE":"0","DisconnectedConnectionsToPrivateSE":"0","TransmittedBytesToPublicSE":"1213
         50","ReceivedBytesFromPublicSE":"27150","TransmittedBytesToPrivateSE":"0","ReceivedByt
         esFromPrivateSE":"0","AppConnectionsCreated":"300","AppConnectionsCleared":"300","AppC
         onnectionsActive":"0","UsedTCPPortsIPv4":"11","UsedUDPPortsIPv4":"4","UsedTCPPortsIPv
         6":"1","UsedUDPPortsIPv6":"5","AvailablePorts":"28232","SystemMaximumFileDescriptor
         s":"960344","SystemUsedFileDescriptors":"1280","ProcessMaximumFileDescriptors":"51200
         0","ProcessUsedFileDescriptors":"152","AvailableDiskBytes":"261886394368", "MicroTenan
         tID": "145257480799129312"}




The following table includes descriptions and supported field format specifications for each field within
the template. To learn more about the format specifications listed for each field, including examples,
see Understanding the Log Stream Content Format.

                                                                        Supported Field Format
 Field                              Description                         Specifications
                                                                             %[OPT]s
                                    Timestamp when the log was               %[OPT]j
 LogTimestamp
                                    generated                                %[OPT]J

                                                                             %[OPT]s
                                                                             %[OPT]j
 Connector                          The App Connector name                   %[OPT]J
                                                                             %[OPT]o


                                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   1
                   PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING APP CONNECTOR METRICS LOG FIELDS




                                                              Supported Field Format
Field                        Description                      Specifications
                                                                  %[OPT]s
                             The maximum CPU usage in the         %[OPT]j
CPUUtilization                                                    %[OPT]J
                             past 5 minutes
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                             The memory utilization of the        %[OPT]j
SystemMemoryUtilization                                           %[OPT]J
                             entire VM
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                             The memory utilization of the        %[OPT]j
ProcessMemoryUtilization                                          %[OPT]J
                             App Connector process
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                             The number of applications           %[OPT]j
AppCount                     configured for access via this       %[OPT]J
                             App Connector                        %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                             The number of services               %[OPT]j
ServiceCount                 configured for access via this       %[OPT]J
                             App Connector                        %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                             The number of targets                %[OPT]j
TargetCount                  configured for access via this       %[OPT]J
                             App Connector                        %[OPT]d




                                                                  ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   2
                   PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING APP CONNECTOR METRICS LOG FIELDS




                                                                 Supported Field Format
Field                          Description                       Specifications
                                                                     %[OPT]s
                               The number of targets alive for       %[OPT]j
AliveTargetCount                                                     %[OPT]J
                               access via this App Connector
                                                                     %[OPT]d

                               The number of active                  %[OPT]s
                               Microtunnel (M-Tunnel)                %[OPT]j
ActiveConnectionsToPublicSE    connections to the Public             %[OPT]J
                               Service Edge for Private              %[OPT]d
                               Access

                               The number of disconnected            %[OPT]s
DisconnectedConnectionsToPu    Microtunnel (M-Tunnel)                %[OPT]j
blicSE                         connections to the Public             %[OPT]J
                               Service Edge                          %[OPT]d

                               The number of active                  %[OPT]s
                               Microtunnel (M-Tunnel)                %[OPT]j
ActiveConnectionsToPrivateSE   connections to the Private            %[OPT]J
                               Service Edge for Private              %[OPT]d
                               Access

                               The number of disconnected            %[OPT]s
DisconnectedConnectionsToPri   Microtunnel (M-Tunnel)                %[OPT]j
vateSE                         connections to the Private            %[OPT]J
                               Service Edge                          %[OPT]d

                               The number of bytes                   %[OPT]s
                               transmitted by the App                %[OPT]j
TransmittedBytesToPublicSE                                           %[OPT]J
                               Connector to the Public Service
                               Edge                                  %[OPT]d

ReceivedBytesFromPublicSE      The number of bytes received          %[OPT]s
                               by the App Connector from the         %[OPT]j
                               Public Service Edge                   %[OPT]J

                                                                     ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   3
                    PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING APP CONNECTOR METRICS LOG FIELDS




                                                              Supported Field Format
Field                         Description                     Specifications
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                              The number of bytes                 %[OPT]s
                              transmitted by the App              %[OPT]j
TransmittedBytesToPrivateSE                                       %[OPT]J
                              Connector to the Private
                              Service Edge                        %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                              The number of bytes received        %[OPT]j
ReceivedBytesFromPrivateSE    by the App Connector from the       %[OPT]J
                              Private Service Edge                %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                              The number of created               %[OPT]j
AppConnectionsCreated         application Microtunnel (M-         %[OPT]J
                              Tunnel) connections                 %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                              The number of cleared               %[OPT]j
AppConnectionsCleared         application Microtunnel (M-         %[OPT]J
                              Tunnel) connections                 %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                              The number of active                %[OPT]j
AppConnectionsActive          application Microtunnel (M-         %[OPT]J
                              Tunnel) connections                 %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                              The number of used TCP ports        %[OPT]j
UsedTCPPortsIPv4                                                  %[OPT]J
                              for an IPv4 connection
                                                                  %[OPT]d

UsedUDPPortsIPv4              The number used UDP ports for       %[OPT]s
                              an IPv4 connection                  %[OPT]j

                                                                  ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   4

                                                              Supported Field Format
Field                          Description                    Specifications
                                                                  %[OPT]J
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                               The number of used TCP ports       %[OPT]j
UsedTCPPortsIPv6                                                  %[OPT]J
                               for an IPv6 connection
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                               The number of used UDP ports       %[OPT]j
UsedUDPPortsIPv6                                                  %[OPT]J
                               for an IPv6 connection
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                                                                  %[OPT]j
AvailablePorts                 The number of usable ports         %[OPT]J
                                                                  %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                               The number of total App            %[OPT]j
SystemMaximumFileDescriptor
                               Connector system file              %[OPT]J
s
                               descriptors                        %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                               The number of used App             %[OPT]j
SystemUsedFileDescriptors      Connector system file              %[OPT]J
                               descriptors                        %[OPT]d

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                               The number of total App            %[OPT]j
ProcessMaximumFileDescriptor
                               Connector process file             %[OPT]J
s
                               descriptors                        %[OPT]d

                                                                Supported Field Format
Field                          Description                      Specifications
                                                                    %[OPT]s
                               The number of used App               %[OPT]j
ProcessUsedFileDescriptors     Connector process file               %[OPT]J
                               descriptors                          %[OPT]d

                                                                    %[OPT]s
                               The number of free bytes             %[OPT]j
AvailableDiskBytes                                                  %[OPT]J
                               available for an App Connector
                                                                    %[OPT]d

                               The Microtenant ID of the App        %[OPT]s
MicroTenantID                                                       %[OPT]j
                               Connector
